blocks.text: Arsenal can open a five-point gap — Chelsea are in the way
Arsenal lead Man City by two with both sides at 28 games. Win at the Emirates today and it stretches to five — the kind of cushion that makes a title. Chelsea arrive with every reason to spoil it.
⚽ Tue 21:00 — Barcelona host Atlético, Copa del Rey — need four goals to survive at Camp Nou
🎿 Thu 16:05 — Tandrevold, Røiseland & Kirkeeide chase the podium, Biathlon World Cup Kontiolahti
